sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96866" key="stixi/ambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στῐχ-ίαμβος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96866.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">iambic verse</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Heph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.211</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
